_comment: Species: Heaven-Devouring Beast (吞天兽) from A Will Eternal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Heaven-Devouring Beast

canonical.appearance: Formless maw 20 m, can swallow mountains, body is hunger incarnate
canonical.size: 20 m adult, 100000 jin; true form swallows continents
canonical.behavior: Cultivates by devouring everything; hunger drives all behavior
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: heaven_devouring_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
